scripts.db:migrate: docker exec -i jobzard-postgres psql -U jobzard -d jobzard_dev < db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker exec -i jobzard-postgres psql -U jobzard -d jobzard_dev < db/seeds/001_seed_dev_user.sql
scripts.db:wait: until docker exec jobzard-postgres pg_isready -U jobzard -d jobzard_dev; do sleep 1; done
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && npm run db:wait && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:test:migrate: docker exec -i jobzard-postgres psql -U jobzard -d jobzard_test < db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql
scripts.db:test:seed: docker exec -i jobzard-postgres psql -U jobzard -d jobzard_test < db/seeds/001_seed_dev_user.sql
scripts.db:test:reset: docker exec -i jobzard-postgres psql -U jobzard -d postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS jobzard_test" && docker exec -i jobzard-postgres createdb -U jobzard jobzard_test && npm run db:test:migrate && npm run db:test:seed
